139.reason: [When a single '|' or '&' appears at the end of file, accessing input.charAt(i) will cause StringIndexOutOfBoundsException because i is already equal to input.length(), but the code does not check bounds before accessing input.charAt(i).]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When a single '|' or '&' appears at the end of file, accessing input.charAt(i) will cause StringIndexOutOfBoundsException because i is already equal to input.length(), but the code does not check bounds before accessing input.charAt(i).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [After reporting the error, the program does not increment 'i' to skip the invalid single '|' or '&', which may cause an infinite loop or reprocessing of the same character.
